name: Diabetic Retinopathy - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Severity)
description: **First diabetes complication phenotype.** Tests ability to find DR patients via diagnosis codes. DR is documented under multiple SNOMED codes by severity (proliferative vs nonproliferative) and presence of macular edema. All DR patients should also have a diabetes diagnosis (T1D or T2D) — natural target for cross-phenotype `_has` queries.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of diabetic retinopathy, including proliferative diabetic retinopathy, nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy, and diabetic macular edema.

prompts.naive: Find all patients with diabetic retinopathy.
prompts.broad: Find all patients diagnosed with any form of diabetic retinopathy — including the parent retinopathy due to diabetes, proliferative diabetic retinopathy, nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy (NPDR), nonproliferative retinopathy due to T2DM specifically, and diabetic macular edema.
prompts.expert: I need to identify all DR patients. DR is documented under multiple SNOMED codes by severity: Retinopathy due to diabetes mellitus (4855003) is the parent, Proliferative retinopathy due to diabetes (59276001), Nonproliferative retinopathy due to diabetes (390834004), Nonproliferative retinopathy due to T2DM specifically (1551000119108), and Macular edema due to diabetes (312912001). Search Condition resources for all five codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with DR diagnosis codes. **First diabetes complication phenotype.** All DR patients should also have a DM diagnosis — natural target for cross-phenotype validation.

required_codes.display: Proliferative retinopathy due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Macular edema due to diabetes mellitus
